sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_shingles (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_shingles (id, text) VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a fast database'), (2, 'Fuzz testing SQL queries efficiently');
UPDATE test_shingles SET text = 'ClickHouse offers powerful analytics capabilities' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArg(text, 2, 4) AS hashes FROM test_shingles;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashArg(text) AS hashes FROM test_shingles WHERE id = 2;
